title: Freshman Year
writer: Thomas Ahearn, F. Maury Grossman, Charles Grayson
actors: Dixie Dunbar, William Lundigan, Constance Moore
plot: Among the freshmen beginning their education at Carlton College are Marian Stuart, the daughter of a judge; Bob Potter, the son of a Carlton alumnus whose family has lost its money; Jay Hill, the son of a theatrical producer; Dott...
